mapper.insert: MERGE INTO film_actor t USING (SELECT #{actorId} AS actor_id, #{filmId} AS film_id) s ON (t.actor_id = s.actor_id AND t.film_id = s.film_id) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (actor_id, film_id, last_update) VALUES (s.actor_id, s.film_id, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now()))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM film_actor WHERE actor_id = #{actorId} AND film_id = #{filmId}
